languages.text: {n}Полковник удивленно смотрит на вас, а потом кивает.{/n} "Так точно. Ваша Светлость".
{n}The colonel looks at you in surprise then nods.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: {n}Полковник удивленно смотрит на вас, а потом кивает.{/n} "Так точно. Ваша Светлость".

traits.locale_text: {n}The colonel looks at you in surprise and gives a nod.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
{n}The colonel looks at you in surprise then nods.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

{n}The colonel looks at you in surprise, then rises to his feet.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I did not expect mercy — but I will repay it as I have been repaid by others who have vied for the rank of colonel."
{n}The colonel looks at you in surprise and gives a nod.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
{n}The colonel looks at you in surprise then nods.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
{n}The colonel looks at you in surprise then nods.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: {n}大佐は驚いた顔で君を見つめ、それから立ち上がった。{/n}「ええ、御{mf|殿|女}様。慈悲は期待していなかったが、他の大佐の位を争った者たちのように、必ず恩返しをする。」
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel looks at you in surprise, then rises to his feet.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I did not expect mercy — but I will repay it as I have been repaid by others who have vied for the rank of colonel."

traits.locale_text: 大佐は驚いた顔で君を見つめ、それから立ち上がった。「ええ、御{mf|殿|女}様。慈悲は期待していなかったが、他の大佐の位を争った者たちのように、必ず恩返しをする。」

languages.text: {n}Le colonel vous lance un regard surpris, puis acquiesce.{/n} « Bien, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel looks at you in surprise then nods.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel vous lance un regard surpris, puis acquiesce.{/n} « Bien, Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: {n}Albay sana şaşkınlıkla bakıyor, sonra başını sallıyor.{/n} "Emredersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel looks at you in surprise then nods.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay sana şaşkınlıkla bakıyor, sonra başını sallıyor.{/n} "Emredersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: {n}Der Colonel sieht dich überrascht an und nickt schließlich.{/n} "Ja, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel looks at you in surprise then nods.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Colonel sieht dich überrascht an und nickt schließlich.{/n} "Ja, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."

languages.text: {n}El coronel te mira sorprendido antes de asentir.{/n} «Sí, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel looks at you in surprise then nods.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel te mira sorprendido antes de asentir.{/n} «Sí, mi{mf|lord|lady}».

languages.text: {n}上校惊讶地看着你，然后点了点头。{/n}“是，大人。”
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel looks at you in surprise then nods.{/n} "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
